title: No error is given when incorrect timezone value is specified for a timetz column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TIMETZ_TBL (f1 DateTime64(2, 'UTC'), f2 String NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO TIMETZ_TBL VALUES ('1970-01-01 01:01:00.00', 'Another Valid Timezone');
INSERT INTO TIMETZ_TBL VALUES ('1970-01-01 02:02:00.00', 'Yet Another Valid Timezone');
SELECT f1, f2, toString(f1) as time_str FROM TIMETZ_TBL WHERE f1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect timezone value for timetz column
